overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along the shoulder of a coastal highway at dusk in GTA V. The camera moves steadily forward beside a concrete barrier as vehicles pass by on the right, with palm trees and ocean visible on the left initially, transitioning to rocky coastline as the camera approaches and passes under an overhead highway gantry.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway shoulder with palm tree lined beach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to the concrete barrier, maintaining a consistent pace as vehicles pass by on the right

notable_agents.action: white transit bus with 'DOWNTOWN' destination display driving past in the traffic lane

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the coastal edge of the highway, silhouetted against the dusk sky
concrete divider separating the shoulder from the main traffic lanes, running parallel to the road
dark ocean water visible beyond the palm trees and coastline, reflecting the dim evening light
large overhead highway sign structure visible in the far distance spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a coastal highway at dusk, with the camera walking along the shoulder next to a concrete barrier. Palm trees line the left side between the road and the ocean, while moderate traffic flows past on the right. A downtown bus passes by in the traffic lane, and the overhead gantry structure is visible far ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway shoulder with rocky coastline

events.description: palm trees exit the frame as the terrain transitions to rocky coastline on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the shoulder, approaching the overhead highway gantry as vehicles regularly pass by

notable_agents.action: white muscle car with headlights on driving past in the right lane

entered.detail: rocky terrain and cliffs replacing the sandy beach and palm trees along the coastal edge

segments.scene_description: The palm trees give way to rocky coastline as the camera continues along the highway shoulder. The overhead gantry structure grows larger and more detailed as the camera approaches it. Various vehicles including a white muscle car pass by in the traffic lanes, their headlights cutting through the dusk lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing under overhead sign gantry

events.description: camera passes directly underneath the large overhead highway gantry structure

agents.ego_description: walking under and past the overhead gantry, continuing along the shoulder as the structure passes overhead and recedes behind

notable_agents.action: semi-truck with trailer driving past in the traffic lane, headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: green highway direction signs mounted on the gantry structure becoming clearly visible as the camera approaches

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes underneath the massive overhead highway gantry, with the green directional signs becoming clearly visible overhead. The structure temporarily obscures part of the sky as the camera walks beneath it. After passing under, the gantry recedes into the distance behind while the rocky coastline continues alongside the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a coastal highway at dusk that transitions from a palm-lined road to a rugged, rocky shoreline. It begins on the shoulder beside a concrete barrier, moving past palm trees and the ocean while a downtown bus flows by in the adjacent traffic. As the camera advances, the palm trees give way to a rocky coastline and the distant overhead gantry grows larger, with the headlights of passing vehicles, including a white muscle car, cutting through the dimming light. The scene then shifts as the camera passes directly underneath the massive gantry, momentarily obscuring the sky with its green directional signs. Finally, the structure recedes into the distance behind the camera as the walk continues along the rocky edge of the highway.
